birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Large numbers of night-flying migrants are reported from August to December at Maxwell's Hill and at Fraser's Hill in Malaysia, as well as at light stations on many islands up to off the western coast. It is still uncertain whether the most northerly parts of the species' range are vacated during the winter. The black-backed dwarf kingfisher is also a breeding visitor across much of the range in India, but its movements here are still uncertain
